description: A host sent unusually high bytes to an external or unfamiliar destination over a suspicious short session.
resolution: Isolate endpoint. Capture traffic dump. Notify security team. Review DLP policies.

description: A client generated a short-duration burst with high packets on rare TCP ports such as 31337 or 4444.
resolution: Block source IP at firewall. Enable IDS rule for rare ports. Review outbound traffic logs.

description: Traffic appeared on rare TCP port 31337 with elevated bytes and packet volume.
resolution: Quarantine both endpoints. Inspect persistence mechanisms. Block port 31337 at network boundaries.

description: A host initiated high-volume outbound TCP traffic to port 4444, a port commonly used by reverse shell tooling.
resolution: Disconnect the host from the network. Collect volatile evidence. Terminate suspicious processes.

description: A source sent repeated UDP traffic with abnormal byte volume for normal name resolution.
resolution: Inspect DNS query payloads. Block suspicious domains. Force DNS through approved resolvers.

description: An internal server transmitted unusually large byte volumes over database ports.
resolution: Pause database access for the account. Review query logs. Rotate credentials if the transfer was not scheduled.

description: A host generated many short TCP sessions with moderate packets toward authentication services.
resolution: Apply temporary source blocking. Inspect authentication failures. Enforce MFA for targeted accounts.

description: ICMP traffic showed unusually high packet counts over a short duration.
resolution: Apply ICMP rate limits. Verify service availability. Identify upstream sources.

description: A workstation sent abnormal traffic to SSH or remote administration ports outside the normal maintenance window.
resolution: Validate administrator identity. Review privileged session logs. Disable unauthorized remote access.

description: A device repeatedly contacted an unusual port with consistent packet patterns and elevated byte volume.
resolution: Block the destination. Collect endpoint telemetry. Compare timing patterns with threat intelligence.

description: A web server produced a sudden burst of outbound TCP traffic after short inbound HTTP activity.
resolution: Review web server access logs. Search for recently modified scripts. Remove malicious files.

description: An internal host communicated with private destinations using high packet counts on administrative ports.
resolution: Segment the source host. Inspect endpoint detections. Review account usage across hosts.
